name: The Slicing Blade of the Flying Phantoms (Secret)

system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Any Melee
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

You leap at your foes slashing sideways and winding back like a snake with your blade, making your strike dangerous to counter. On a Success you do normal Damage. Anyone who attempts to counter this and fails takes 1 Extra Wound as your blade bites them on its backswing. Though known only to Mystic Sword and associated with the Flying Phantoms this is actually a forgotten, ancient Technique that was rediscovered by Lady White Blade. Cathartic: Works as above except you do 1 additional Extra Wound per Rank of Waijia on the initial attack and on the backswing as well.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.accessNotes: Though known only to Mystic Sword and associated with the Flying Phantoms this is actually a forgotten, ancient Technique that was rediscovered by Lady White Blade.
